triaged_components.name: process_tube
triaged_components.reasoning: Critical component with deposition buildup degradation that directly affects wafer quality and requires tube exchange at 20 microns. Tube contamination leads to scrapped wafer batches and extended downtime.

candidate_states.name: deposition_thickness
candidate_states.description: Accumulated deposition buildup on tube walls

candidate_states.name: particle_contamination_level
candidate_states.description: Level of particle contamination in tube

candidate_events.name: excessive_deposition
candidate_events.description: deposition thickness reaches approximately 20 microns requiring tube exchange

candidate_events.name: particle_contamination
candidate_events.description: particles exceed specifications requiring tube exchange

triaged_components.name: heating_zones
triaged_components.reasoning: Critical for temperature uniformity across wafer. Heating element resistance increases with temperature and degrades over time. Temperature non-uniformity causes film thickness variation and out-of-spec deposition.

candidate_states.name: element_degradation_level
candidate_states.description: Degradation level from thermal cycling and chemical exposure

candidate_events.name: heating_element_failure
candidate_events.description: heating element requires replacement

candidate_events.name: electrical_bridge_formation
candidate_events.description: vapours form condensates from salts or oxides creating electrical bridges

candidate_events.name: power_terminal_fracture
candidate_events.description: stresses can fracture the lead at the element weld

triaged_components.name: vacuum_pump
triaged_components.reasoning: Essential for maintaining process pressure. Vacuum pump failure leads to inability to reach process pressure and run abort. Oil contamination and seal degradation affect pumping performance.

candidate_states.name: oil_contamination_level
candidate_states.description: Level of oil contamination from process vapours

candidate_states.name: pump_seal_wear
candidate_states.description: Wear level of pump seals from corrosive gases

candidate_events.name: motor_overheating
candidate_events.description: Motor overheats due to restricted air-flow

candidate_events.name: oil_contamination
candidate_events.description: Oil becomes cloudy or discoloured from process vapours

candidate_events.name: motor_electrical_failure
candidate_events.description: Motor fails electrical safety tests

triaged_components.name: mass_flow_controllers
triaged_components.reasoning: Critical for gas flow control. MFC drift or failure causes incorrect gas ratios, wrong film stoichiometry, and recipe deviation. Gradual drift in MFC calibration is a primary degradation story.

candidate_states.name: calibration_drift
candidate_states.description: Drift in flow measurement calibration over time

candidate_states.name: valve_wear_level
candidate_states.description: Wear level of internal valve components

candidate_states.name: zero_stability_drift
candidate_states.description: Drift in zero flow reading stability

candidate_events.name: high_limit_alarm
candidate_events.description: flow exceeds high limit threshold

candidate_events.name: low_limit_alarm
candidate_events.description: flow below low limit threshold

candidate_events.name: system_error
candidate_events.description: any severe error condition

candidate_events.name: over_temperature
candidate_events.description: internal temperature exceeds maximum

candidate_events.name: valve_drive_alarm
candidate_events.description: valve drive level exceeds maximum

candidate_events.name: controller_error
candidate_events.description: setpoint and flow difference persists

candidate_events.name: memory_failure
candidate_events.description: EEPROM checksum error

triaged_components.name: pressure_control_valve
triaged_components.reasoning: Important for maintaining process pressure setpoint. Valve degradation affects pressure control accuracy and can impact deposition uniformity.

candidate_states.name: valve_seat_wear
candidate_states.description: Wear level of valve seat elastomer

candidate_states.name: valve_drive_accuracy
candidate_states.description: Accuracy of valve drive level control

candidate_events.name: excessive_closed_conductance
candidate_events.description: valve does not close properly allowing unwanted flow

candidate_events.name: insufficient_full_flow
candidate_events.description: unit does not achieve full flow rate

candidate_events.name: valve_malfunction
candidate_events.description: valve sticking, clogged, contaminated, or corroded

triaged_components.name: temperature_controllers
triaged_components.reasoning: Controls heating zone temperatures and temperature ramping. Thermocouple degradation affects temperature control accuracy which impacts process uniformity.

candidate_events.name: excess_temperature_alarm
candidate_events.description: Temperature exceeds safe operating limits

candidate_events.name: thermocouple_break
candidate_events.description: Thermocouple sensor failure

candidate_events.name: temperature_setpoint_not_reached
candidate_events.description: Temperature does not reach programmed setpoint

candidate_events.name: temperature_instability
candidate_events.description: Temperature control is unstable

triaged_components.name: boat_loader
triaged_components.reasoning: Mechanical system for wafer boat positioning. Has fault conditions for door closure and position timeout that could affect process safety and automation.

candidate_events.name: door_not_closed
candidate_events.description: Door closure status monitoring for safe operation

candidate_events.name: boat_position_timeout
candidate_events.description: Boat fails to reach setpoint position within expected time

triaged_components.name: gas_delivery_system
triaged_components.reasoning: Supplies process gases with degradation mechanisms including filter clogging and valve corrosion. Important for gas purity and flow stability.

candidate_states.name: filter_clog_level
candidate_states.description: Level of particle accumulation in inline gas filters

candidate_states.name: valve_corrosion_level
candidate_states.description: Corrosion level of valve components from gas exposure

candidate_events.name: low_pressure_alarm
candidate_events.description: Pressure is low after the gassystem

candidate_events.name: no_flow_condition
candidate_events.description: No gas flow through system

candidate_events.name: high_limit_alarm
candidate_events.description: Flow exceeds high limit threshold

candidate_events.name: system_error
candidate_events.description: Severe error condition in flow device

candidate_events.name: valve_drive_alarm
candidate_events.description: Valve drive level exceeds maximum

triaged_components.name: exhaust_system
triaged_components.reasoning: Removes process gases and maintains vacuum. Has degradation mechanisms for oil mist filter and pump performance but lower priority than primary process components.

candidate_states.name: oil_mist_filter_clog
candidate_states.description: Clogging level of oil mist filter

candidate_states.name: pump_performance_degradation
candidate_states.description: Degradation of pump performance from contaminated condensate

candidate_events.name: dangerous_gas_discharge
candidate_events.description: discharge of dangerous gases and vapours to surrounding atmosphere

candidate_events.name: excessive_outlet_pressure
candidate_events.description: outlet pressure exceeds maximum allowable limit

triaged_components.name: process_controller
triaged_components.reasoning: Coordinates process sequence and safety interlocks. Has fault conditions for dangerous situations and continuous loops but primarily software-based with limited physical degradation.

candidate_events.name: dangerous_situation_detected
candidate_events.description: Manual abort required if operator foresees dangerous situation

candidate_events.name: continuous_loop_fault
candidate_events.description: Continuous looped process recipe needs reset

modeling_notes: Process tube deposition buildup is the primary degradation mechanism requiring tube exchange at 20 microns
MFC calibration drift is identified as a key gradual degradation affecting gas ratios and film stoichiometry
Heating element resistance increase with temperature is a well-characterized degradation mechanism
Vacuum pump oil contamination and seal wear are critical for maintaining process pressure
Temperature controllers rely on thermocouple sensors that degrade with thermal cycling
All components with high failure consequences (tube contamination, temperature non-uniformity, MFC drift, vacuum pump failure, heating element failure) are prioritized as full_component
Flow paths connect gas delivery system to process tube and process tube to exhaust system with nitrogen, silane, and process gases
Schema fields provide observable signals for state estimation while flow paths provide internal signals for component wiring
